about.heroSubtitle: Our journey in delivering the best shopping experience in Indonesia
about.storyContent: Clarissa was founded with a vision to become a one-stop shopping destination offering high-quality fashion, beauty, and accessories at affordable prices.
about.missionContent: To deliver an enjoyable shopping experience and provide the best products for every customer.
about.visionContent: To become the leading and most trusted fashion retail network in Indonesia.
